title: phyllorkis trimenii
intro: Phyllorkis trimenii, also known as the 'Yellow Penda', is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is traditionally used in African herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Phyllorkis trimenii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which are said to promote respiratory health and reduce inflammation.
